notes: Arma 3 stock rubber armor material. Engine coeff ~0.2x vs Default. Used for tires, seals, and flexible components. High ductility absorbs some KE. Represents the game's abstract 'rubber' armor class.

source.reference: ARMA 3 game engine configuration, BI config reference
source.methodology: RHAe=0.2 is the ARMA 3 game engine value for its 'rubber' armor class. Density set to approximate rubber material.
